description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior features a combination of light beige and dark brown cladding, with large rectangular windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The house includes a covered porch area at the front, a balcony on the upper floor, and a spacious terrace. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some windows extending from floor to ceiling and others more modest in size. The main entryway is recessed under the upper floor, providing shelter and a sense of depth to the facade. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roof, beige and dark brown exterior, large windows, and a covered porch with balcony.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front facade with the covered porch, balcony above, and large windows with curtains visible.
description_view_1: This side view shows the extended balcony, a large picture window, and the recessed entryway beneath the upper floor.
description_view_2: This rear view displays the flat roof, a mix of window sizes, and the clean geometric lines of the house.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the side terrace, the upper balcony with railing, and the main entry area beneath the overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry under upper floor with covered porch, steps, and minimalist design
